subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Due to scarcity of time I am compelled to be brief. Thy letter dated 24 Jamádíyu'l-Avval [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از قلت فرصت مجبور بر اختصارم نامه مورخ بیست و چهارم جمادی الاول
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
